name: SOCi Social Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
highlight_text: Who it is best for: Agencies and SMBs
product_overview_description:
SOCi's social media tool is designed specifically for multi-location brands looking to enhance their social media presence with local relevance. While the UI may be a bit rigid, the platform offers powerful features to maintain a consistent content strategy. SOCi's Genius Social uses AI to analyze various data sources, providing deep local insights that shape hyper-localized content strategies and engagement approaches.

Source: SOCi

Core Features

  • Improve efficiency with AI-optimized workflows tailored for multi-location marketing.
  • Access AI-generated monthly content calendars customized for each location's audience preferences.
  • Receive on-brand, auto-crafted engagement replies for a unified brand voice across locations.
  • Easily create posts, contests, and coupons for multiple pages across major platforms with one click.
  • Use a curated library of on-brand content assets for consistency and time-saving.
  • Supports Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, and Google Business Profile.
  • Monitor all social media engagements at the national level, including comments, messages, and tweets.
  • Assign engagements to local teams using rules-based assignments for timely responses.
  • Get timely notifications and use automated smart rules to address all engagements promptly.

What’s great

✅Provides great insights for localized social content

✅AI-powered platform with strong data capabilities

✅Whitelabeling is available for agencies and resellers

What’s not great

❌Has posting limitations – users can't schedule pictures and videos together on certain platforms

❌Reseller support is limited

Pricing

SOCi doesn’t have transparent pricing information available for their social media tool. You can contact their team directly for a quote after demoing the tool.
